svg.text: Debuted the WLM shirt at Yeezy Season 9 in Paris.
The ADL called it a white supremacist phrase.
Called Kanye privately. Kanye posted their texts
publicly — Instagram banned him for it.
Posted the DEFCON tweet to 32.7M followers.
Jamie Lee Curtis, Jack Antonoff, David Schwimmer
cut ties. Forbes strips billionaire status Oct 25.
"I like Hitler. I love Nazis." Elon Musk
suspended his account again the next day.
